examples: Every storyteller, or, maybe every town, might have had a slightly different version of the same folktale.
In the case of folktales, each storyteller would specify a particular location and time, though the time and location would differ for different storytellers.
His new book shows him to be a first-rate storyteller.
Roth, a skilled storyteller, admits to an obsession with green grass around his corporate offices.
Give any novel by Mark Helprin, the greatest living storyteller in the English language.
